description: Report date (YYYY-MM-DD). Primary time dimension for event-level analysis.
GA4 property ID (e.g. properties/297809897). Identifies the GA4 account.
Fivetran-generated unique hash ID for the row. Used for deduplication.
Traffic source that first acquired the user (e.g. google / facebook / (direct)).
Campaign name under which the user was first acquired.
Name of the GA4 event tracked (e.g. user_engagement / purchase / page_view / scroll). Core event identifier.
Numeric ID of the campaign under which the user was first acquired.
Marketing medium that first acquired the user (e.g. cpc / organic / referral).
Fraction of sessions that were not engaged (0.0–1.0).
Total number of sessions in which this event occurred.
Monetary or custom numeric value associated with the event (e.g. revenue value for purchase events).
Number of sessions that were engaged and recorded this event.
Total number of times this event was fired across all sessions.
Number of active users who triggered this event.
Total users (new + returning) who triggered this event.
Average session duration in seconds for sessions containing this event.
Total page or screen views recorded in sessions that included this event.
Number of first-time users who triggered this event.
Timestamp when Fivetran last synced this row from the source.
